details.subject: Welcome to The Resilience Project’s 2026 School Wellbeing Program!
details.bodyExcerpt: Hi $(contact_id : (Contacts) firstname), Thank you for confirming your school’s involvement in The Resilience Project’s 2026 School Wellbeing Program! We're thrilled to have the opportunity to partner with you and support the wellbeing of your school community. Please find a program quote attached, which provides cost estimates for budgeting or purchase order requirements. You will be invoiced after you confirm student numbers and resources for each year level in your Welcome Meeting (a purc…

details.subject: TRP Update Request — are you still exploring options?

If you’d like to explore this further, please feel free to book a short meeting via the link here, or simply reply with any questions. Thank you again for considering our programs. We’d love the opportunity to work together. Kind regards, The Resilience Project

fieldUpdates.value: if (account_id : (Accounts) cf_accounts_organisationtype) == 'Workplace' then 'Workplace' else if  (account_id : (Accounts) cf_accounts_organisationtype) == 'School' and (account_id : (Accounts) source) == 'WEBSERVICE' then 'New School' else if  (account_id : (Accounts) cf_accounts_organisationtype) == 'Early Years Centre' then 'Early Years' else if  (account_id : (Accounts) cf_accounts_organisationtype) == 'School' and (account_id : (Accounts) source) != 'WEBSERVICE' then 'Existing School' else ' ' end

Here are the details: LEADING TRP Date and Time: $cf_vtcmregistration_eventshortname Zoom link: $cf_vtcmregistration_eventzoomlink Please note the time difference if you are based in SA, WA, NT or QLD. All of our events are displayed in Australian Eastern Daylight time. WELCOME MEETING If you haven't already scheduled your Welcome meeting, please book in via the link …

tasks.title: Send reminder to existing confirmed schools to place their curric order

details.summary: Send reminder to existing confirmed schools to place their curric order
details.subject: TRP | Order 2025 Program Resources
details.bodyExcerpt: Hi $(contact_id : (Contacts) firstname) I just wanted to reach out and remind you to please order your curriculum resources for 2025 to ensure that you receive your resources by the end of the school year. Please click on the link below to place your order. CLICK HERE TO ORDER YOUR PROGRAM RESOURCES FOR 2025 If you have any questions regarding the ordering process, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Take care,

workflows.description: Send a reminder to confirmed existing schools to place their curriculum order (confirmed after 16 Sept)

All :   Event Registrant is not empty
           Event No is not empty
           Datetime Registered more than 7 days ago
           Datetime Registered less than 8 days ago
           Source is Info Session Recording
           (Deals) Deals - Number of Participants less than or equal to 350
           (Deals) Deals - Sales Stage is Considering
Any : -NA-

tasks.title: Send info session recording follow up 1

details.summary: Send info session recording follow up 1
details.subject: FW: Thanks for your interest in our School Wellbeing Program!
details.bodyExcerpt: Hi $(cf_vtcmregistration_eventregistrant : (Contacts) firstname), I hope you’re well! Just wondering if you’ve had a chance to review the information you requested about our School Wellbeing Program? Registrations close very soon. If you’re ready to jump right in, you can confirm your school’s place for 2026 here. Or if there’s anything else I can do to support your decision-making process, please let me know. Warm regards, $(cf_vtcmregistration_replyto : (Users) first_name) ---------- Forwarded…

tasks.title: Send info session recording follow up 2

details.summary: Send info session recording follow up 2
details.subject: Have more questions about our School Wellbeing Program?
details.bodyExcerpt: Hi $(cf_vtcmregistration_eventregistrant : (Contacts) firstname), We hope you’re doing well. Just checking in one last time to see if you’re still considering our School Wellbeing Program for 2026? If you’re keen to proceed, we’d love to set you and your school up for success with our onboarding process before registrations close in February. You can confirm your school’s place for 2026 here. Hopefully you’ve seen the FAQs, but we’d be more than happy to answer specific questions if it would be …

details.summary: Send info session recording follow up 1
details.subject: Fwd: Thanks for your interest in our School Wellbeing Program!
details.bodyExcerpt: Hi $(cf_vtcmregistration_eventregistrant : (Contacts) firstname), I hope you’re doing well. Just following up to see if you’d like to jump on a quick call to discuss our School Wellbeing Program and how it could work for your school in 2026? If so, please feel free to book a time that suits you. A friendly reminder that registrations close mid-February. If you are keen to proceed with the program, we’d love to set you and your school up for success with our onboarding process as soon as possible…
